title: Clarify hardware details for t_deck keyboard/trackball I2C and ThinkNode M7 PoE pinout
description: P0 task: Update lichen/boards, docs, DTS comments, hardware matrix, spec notes for t_deck I2C (keyboard/trackball) and ThinkNode M7 PoE pinout.
